per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you notice any other symptoms when it happens?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Sometimes I get a little lightheaded and short of breath when it gets bad. And my arm on that side - it feels like there's a tingling sensation in it during the more severe episodes.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you have any sweating, nausea, or dizziness with it?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I do get some mild nausea during the episodes, but no vomiting.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you have any swelling in your legs or feet?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, I've noticed some mild bilateral ankle swelling lately. My shoes feel tighter than usual.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Has anyone in your family had heart disease or heart attacks?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My father actually passed away from a heart attack when he was 52.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Has anyone in your family had other serious medical conditions?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My dad had a heart attack and didn't make it. He was only 52 at the time, which is pretty young.
